runTitle: Vercel Release Smoke - v8.12.0 Dashboard UX Release
coveredSurfaces: GitLab tag pipeline v8.12.0 completed successfully with frontend deploy, AI Engine deploy, frontend post-deploy smoke, and AI Engine post-deploy smoke
Vercel production deployment dpl_9tVqnvdBXyaHqEAiXNHgnYrEmnLp was Ready for alias https://openmanager-ai.vercel.app
Production GET / returned the OpenManager AI landing page
Production GET /login returned the login page
Production /api/version returned version 8.12.0 and commit b21e0aff5091c3420b40322b24a9a11b7908f7d8
Vercel usage check passed with effective 13.9999 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 12180
skippedSurfaces: Broad dashboard browser matrix was not rerun in production because the changed dashboard UX was already covered by local Playwright QA run QA-20260521-0552 before release
Conversational AI QA was skipped because this release did not change AI prompt routing, model/provider selection, tool schemas, response contracts, or Vision routing
Cloud Run admin monitoring endpoints were not called directly; GitLab AI Engine deploy and post-deploy smoke were used as deployment evidence

expertAssessments.rationale: GitLab tag deploy pipeline completed all frontend and AI Engine deployment/smoke jobs, the Vercel production deployment is Ready, and version smoke matched v8.12.0 at the release commit.
Release-facing smoke covered production landing, login, and version endpoints, while the dashboard UX-specific browser behavior remains linked to the prior targeted Playwright QA run.
The production release smoke confirmed the deployed frontend is serving the v8.12.0 build; dashboard search and trend interactions were already verified in QA-20260521-0552.

usageChecks.summary: Current Vercel billing period reviewed after v8.12.0 production release smoke; effective 13.9999 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 12180.

completedImprovements.title: v8.12.0 dashboard UX release deployed and smoke verified on production
completedImprovements.evidence: GitLab tag pipeline 2543011513 succeeded; Vercel deployment dpl_9tVqnvdBXyaHqEAiXNHgnYrEmnLp is Ready; production /, /login, and /api/version smoke checks passed.

notes: The first pending period was caused by the self-hosted runner finishing the preceding main validate pipeline; no resource queue remained after runner assignment.
Dashboard UX interaction evidence is recorded separately in QA-20260521-0552 as a local Playwright MCP targeted run.
